title: `check` does not appear to detect many cases of multiple drivers

features.name: multiple always blocks driving inout with non-blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include an inout port driven by multiple always @(*) blocks using non-blocking assignment (<=) to create multiple-driver scenario

features.name: ternary operator driving same signal from multiple always blocks
features.description: Code should include two always @(*) blocks both assigning to the same signal using ternary operators, creating a multiple-driver condition
